docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BRODRICK, ERIC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,827.74 FILED BY BRODRICK, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT LIVAHA, EVERETT DBA TERRIFIC JUDGEMENT RECOVERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF ERIC BRODRICK WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EVERETT LIVAHA DBA TERRIFIC JUDGMENT RECOVERY WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. VENUE IS IMPROPER IN SAN FRANCISCO. PLAINTIFF ATTACHES A JUDGMENT RENDERED BY THE ALAMEDA COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT. THAT COURT IS THE ONLY FORUM TO HEAR HIS CHALLENGE. SEE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 116.730, 116.740
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $75.00) SERVED AUG-22-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LIVAHA, EVERETT DBA TERRIFIC JUDGEMENT RECOVERY
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
